title: [IOS] Location sharing dialogue - Don't Allow is selected
scenario: Location permission prompt reappears in Find My Device screen after user selects "Don't Allow" during onboarding on Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: Launch Poly Studio Mobile app for the first time
When the location sharing dialog appears, tap "Don't Allow"
Tap on the menu icon (hamburger) or settings gear
Observe the permission prompt that appears
expected: After selecting "Don't Allow" initially, navigating to Find My Device should show a permission prompt with "Cancel" and "Enable Now" options, with the Find My Device screen visible behind the prompt. This behavior should persist after restarting the app.
